## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/Automation
- [ ] Security

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend (`client/`)
- [ ] Backend (`server/`)
- [ ] Shared contracts (`shared/`)
- [ ] Database schema
- [ ] Workflows / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Ran: npm ci
- [ ] Ran: npm run lint
- [ ] Ran: npm test
- [ ] Ran: npm run build
- [ ] (Optional) Ran: npm run verify

## Risk & Production Impact

- [ ] No production behavior changes
- [ ] Production behavior changed and documented in README or PR notes
- [ ] Requires environment variable changes
- [ ] Requires database migration or db sync

## Agent Readiness Checklist

- [ ] Updated AGENT_GUIDE.md if entry points/commands/structure changed
- [ ] Updated ARCHITECTURE.md if architecture decisions changed
- [ ] Updated TOOLING.md if commands/workflows changed
- [ ] Added or updated tests for API/domain behavior changes
